positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a crescent moon embracing a cluster of geometric stars and constellations. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, featuring strong, contrasting silhouettes against a gradient deep indigo and celestial gold background. The style is clean line art meets abstract celestial geometry, suitable for screen printing on black or cream fabric. Incorporate delicate patterns of fine stippling and dotted lines for depth. Focus on high contrast, clean edges, and a sense of cosmic wonder. Perfect for apparel and home decor prints.
